name: Check Into Cash
description_short: Check Into Cash is located at 2645 Manhattan Blvd Suite D-3, Harvey, LA 70058. Google reviewers rate the branch 5.0 stars across 635 reviews. Call +1 504-367-1353.
description_long: Check Into Cash is an established financial services provider that has operated for 30 years, with a physical storefront network including a location in Ferndale, Michigan at 749 East 9 Mile Road. The company specializes in short-term emergency lending products designed for consumers facing unexpected expenses or cash flow gaps before their next paycheck. Their primary loan offerings include payday loans (up to $600), installment loans with longer terms and lower payments, title loans using vehicle equity, and a Flex Line of Credit for repeat borrowing. The company operates both through physical retail locations and online channels, allowing customers to apply and potentially receive same-day funding. Beyond lending, Check Into Cash provides ancillary financial services including check cashing (accepting checks others may refuse), Western Union money transfers, bill payment processing, Green Dot Visa debit cards, and tax preparation services. The Ferndale location maintains extended hours (9am-7pm most days, 8am-7pm Friday, 9am-4pm Saturday, closed Sunday) to accommodate working customers. The company emphasizes speed and convenience, promising that approved applicants can walk out with cash immediately, and requires standard documentation: government-issued photo ID, proof of income, Social Security number, and checking account details. Check Into Cash distinguishes itself through its 30-year operational history, broad service offerings beyond lending, willingness to cash checks competitors refuse, and established retail presence across multiple states. However, as a payday and title lender, the company operates in a sector known for high-cost debt products; while specific APR rates are not disclosed on the provided pages, payday loans typically carry substantially higher costs than traditional banking alternatives. The company's business model depends on short-term lending cycles and repeat customer borrowing, which may not represent the most economical solution for long-term financial needs.
address: 2645 Manhattan Blvd Suite D-3, Harvey, LA 70058

pros: Same-day funding available for approved applicants who can walk out with cash in hand
Up to $600 payday loans available both in-store and online
Extended hours of operation (open 8am-7pm most weekdays, Saturday hours available)
Multiple ancillary services beyond lending: check cashing, Western Union transfers, bill pay, tax preparation
Willing to cash checks that other financial institutions may refuse
Simple application requirements: government ID, proof of income, checking account information
Established physical retail locations for in-person service and immediate cash disbursement
cons: APR rates and specific fee schedules not disclosed on primary pages; customers must visit store or access state-specific documents
Payday and title loans typically carry significantly higher costs than personal loans or credit union alternatives
Same-day funding convenience may encourage short-term borrowing cycles that trap consumers in debt
Limited maximum loan amount ($600 for payday loans) requires repeat borrowing for larger emergencies
No mention of credit-building features or alternative products for consumers working toward better credit
best_for: Workers facing small unexpected expenses ($100-$600) before their next paycheck
Consumers without access to traditional bank credit or who have been denied by other lenders
Individuals who need immediate cash and can repay within 2-4 weeks
People in need of check cashing, money transfer, or bill payment services at a single location
diagnosis: Check Into Cash is best for workers who need immediate emergency cash ($100-$600) before payday and have limited access to traditional credit alternatives. The primary caveat is that payday and title loans are high-cost products—while specific APRs are not disclosed on the website, customers should review the company's rate and fee schedule and consider whether the convenience of same-day funding justifies the typically substantial cost compared to personal loans, credit union PALs, or employer advances.
services: Installment loans with longer repayment terms
Flex Line of Credit (revolving credit up to established limit)
Check cashing (including checks other providers refuse)
Green Dot Visa debit card accounts
In-store cash disbursement for approved applicants
